anthropic_claude_news.title: EU Commission looking at practical consequences of Anthropic decision, spokesperson says
anthropic_claude_news.summary: The European Commission is weighing the practical fallout of Anthropic disabling its top models for foreign nationals, with a spokesperson flagging that the US export controls behind it could discriminate against EU partners. Brussels is examining the trade and competition implications. Automation angle: Ship a portfolio demo built on this Anthropic/Claude shift the same week — proof to interviewers you ride the tooling edge.

anthropic_claude_news.title: Anthropic ban: Sarvam AI's Pratyush Kumar warns against reliance on foreign models
anthropic_claude_news.summary: Sarvam AI's Pratyush Kumar says the US ban on foreign access to advanced models lays bare the danger of depending on foreign LLMs, and urges Indian firms to build sovereign AI stacks at home. He frames the episode as a wake-up call for domestic model ownership. Automation angle: Ship a portfolio demo built on this Anthropic/Claude shift the same week — proof to interviewers you ride the tooling edge.

anthropic_claude_news.title: AI coding agents find the right file but miss the exact lines that matter, study shows
anthropic_claude_news.summary: A new study finds AI coding agents such as Claude Code and Codex reliably locate the correct file but miss most of the critical lines inside it. The precision gap means autonomous edits still need close human review before merge. Automation angle: Ship a portfolio demo built on this Anthropic/Claude shift the same week — proof to interviewers you ride the tooling edge.

anthropic_claude_news.title: Amazon and five other companies reportedly triggered the government crackdown on Anthropic's Fable model
anthropic_claude_news.summary: Amazon's Andy Jassy and executives from five other tech firms reportedly warned the Trump administration about security vulnerabilities in Anthropic's Fable model — even though Amazon is a major Anthropic backer — helping trigger the government clampdown. The report underscores how rivalry and security politics now shape model access. Automation angle: Ship a portfolio demo built on this Anthropic/Claude shift the same week — proof to interviewers you ride the tooling edge.

anthropic_claude_news.title: Mag 7? MANGOS? SpaceX forces name rethink on Wall Street's tech-stock moniker
anthropic_claude_news.summary: SpaceX's record IPO vaulted its valuation above Mag-7 members Tesla and Meta, prompting Wall Street to rethink the 'Magnificent 7' label as AI-era contenders like OpenAI and Anthropic approach trillion-dollar status. The reshuffle signals how fast AI-linked valuations are redrawing the index. Automation angle: Ship a portfolio demo built on this Anthropic/Claude shift the same week — proof to interviewers you ride the tooling edge.

anthropic_claude_news.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
anthropic_claude_news.summary: With Anthropic suspending access to its newest models for foreign nationals, Indian tech leaders are split on whether the episode is a genuine wake-up call for India's AI ambitions or a temporary disruption. The debate centers on sovereign-AI investment versus continued reliance on US frontier models. Automation angle: Ship a portfolio demo built on this Anthropic/Claude shift the same week — proof to interviewers you ride the tooling edge.

anthropic_claude_news.title: US ban on Anthropic's Fable 5 & Mythos 5 to put Indian IT services firms at competitive disadvantage
anthropic_claude_news.summary: US restrictions on foreign access to Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 put Indian enterprises and IT-services firms at a competitive disadvantage, cutting them off from the latest frontier capabilities. Firms built around reselling US model access face the sharpest exposure. Automation angle: Ship a portfolio demo built on this Anthropic/Claude shift the same week — proof to interviewers you ride the tooling edge.

anthropic_claude_news.title: Project Glasswing melts: US government suspends early access to Anthropic's Fable 5, Mythos 5 within days of rollout
anthropic_claude_news.summary: India's brief window of early access to Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 ended within days as a US government directive halted local access. The move signals a new, harder phase of AI export controls. Automation angle: Ship a portfolio demo built on this Anthropic/Claude shift the same week — proof to interviewers you ride the tooling edge.

ai_business_automation.title: Magicpin scales AI assistant Vera, targets over 10 lakh merchants by 2026: CEO
ai_business_automation.summary: Magicpin is scaling its AI assistant Vera to over 10 lakh merchants by 2026, giving restaurants and retailers real-time order-volume insights to plan operations and manage demand. A concrete sector deployment of conversational AI in Indian retail ops. Automation angle: Clone this deployment as a portfolio build (n8n/Claude Code) for a smaller firm in the same sector.

ai_business_automation.title: Amazon to expand automation use in inventory management at India fulfilment centres
ai_business_automation.summary: Amazon will deepen automation across inventory management in its Indian fulfilment network, says Amazon Robotics chief technologist Tye Brady, on top of robotics already in use and large long-term capital commitments. A sector signal for AI-driven warehouse ops in India. Automation angle: Clone this deployment as a portfolio build (n8n/Claude Code) for a smaller firm in the same sector.

unaddressed_ai_problems.title: Consulting Firm’s Report on How Awesome AI Is Found to Contain Idiotic AI Hallucinations
unaddressed_ai_problems.summary: A consulting firm's glowing report on AI's benefits was itself found to contain AI hallucinations — fabricated facts slipped through unchecked. It's a concrete example of an unsolved problem: hallucination in production deliverables with no reliable verification layer, hitting any firm shipping AI-written work to clients. Automation angle: Pick this unsolved gap and ship a 1-week Claude Code demo titled 'I fixed X with AI automation'.

unaddressed_ai_problems.title: KPMG fabricated AI case studies in a report designed to sell clients on AI adoption
unaddressed_ai_problems.summary: KPMG published a report selling clients on AI adoption that itself contained fabricated case studies involving UBS, the NHS and others. It's a live, unsolved problem — no dependable provenance/verification layer for AI-generated business content — and it directly burns the consultancies pushing AI hardest. Automation angle: Pick this unsolved gap and ship a 1-week Claude Code demo titled 'I fixed X with AI automation'.

ai_business_opportunities.title: As AI companies race to go public, who else is along for the ride?
ai_business_opportunities.summary: As AI companies rush toward IPOs in the wake of SpaceX's blockbuster listing, a second tier of startups and suppliers is trying to ride the wave. The signal: capital is flooding AI-adjacent infra and services — a window to build picks-and-shovels tools for the newly-funded. Automation angle: Freshly funded/IPO-bound players hire in 60-90 days — bookmark their careers page and apply next week.

global_ai_news.title: Why Jayant Chaudhary sees AI as India's open door, not its threat
global_ai_news.summary: Skilling minister Jayant Chaudhary casts AI as India's opportunity rather than a jobs threat, pointing to the Skill India AI Assistant and reskilling at scale as the path to capture it. He framed the recent AI summit around possibility over fear. Automation angle: Macro signal — deep-read only if it touches a model/tool you build on; otherwise interview small-talk.

global_ai_news.title: Human-centric technology at heart of India's AI ambitions: PM Narendra Modi at Bharat Innovates 2026
global_ai_news.summary: At Bharat Innovates 2026 in Nice, PM Modi pushed a 'technology for humanity' / 'AI for all' framing for India's AI ambitions, with French President Macron echoing the human-centric line. The messaging positions India as a values-led AI power. Automation angle: Macro signal — deep-read only if it touches a model/tool you build on; otherwise interview small-talk.

global_ai_news.title: 'Shared ambition of reliable, open, safe AI': Macron at Bharat Innovates seeks ethical use of AI
global_ai_news.summary: At Bharat Innovates, Macron warned against AI monopolisation and called for international cooperation, stressing France and India's shared commitment to reliable, open and safe AI. The remarks lean against single-vendor concentration of frontier models. Automation angle: Macro signal — deep-read only if it touches a model/tool you build on; otherwise interview small-talk.

global_ai_news.title: How Zoho Labs pivoted to inference engineering
global_ai_news.summary: At DevSparks 2026, Zoho's Ramprakash Ramamoorthy explained how cheap open-weight models forced the lab to pivot from training toward inference engineering — squeezing cost and latency out of serving. It's a template for in-house AI teams in a commoditized-model world. Automation angle: Macro signal — deep-read only if it touches a model/tool you build on; otherwise interview small-talk.

global_ai_news.title: Chinese AI engineers have also boarded SpaceX's wealth rocket - 36 Kr
global_ai_news.summary: A 36Kr report notes Chinese AI engineers are among the big winners of SpaceX's record IPO, riding the equity wave alongside US staff. The story is more about AI-talent wealth concentration than any product news. Automation angle: Macro signal — deep-read only if it touches a model/tool you build on; otherwise interview small-talk.

indian_ai_industry.title: AI can be more disruptive as it targets both cognitive and skill-based jobs: CEA Nageswaran
indian_ai_industry.summary: Chief Economic Adviser V Anantha Nageswaran says AI is broader than past tech shifts because it hits both cognitive and skill-based jobs, but cautions current fears are hype-driven and history points to transformation, not mass unemployment. A measured read on AI's labour impact in India. Automation angle: India-market wedge — a localized version of this is a sellable AI-automation service.

ai_model_benchmarks.title: AgentBeats: Agentifying Agent Assessment for Openness, Standardization, and Reproducibility
ai_model_benchmarks.summary: AgentBeats: Agentifying Agent Assessment for Openness, Standardization, and Reproducibility. Agent systems are advancing quickly across domains, but their evaluation remains fragmented. Most benchmarks rely on fixed, LLM-centric harnesses that require heavy integration, create test-production. Automation angle: Switch your portfolio demos to whichever model ranks best on coding/agent benchmarks this week.

ai_model_benchmarks.title: EpiBench: Verifiable Evaluation of AI Agents on Epigenomics Analysis
ai_model_benchmarks.summary: EpiBench: Verifiable Evaluation of AI Agents on Epigenomics Analysis. We introduce EpiBench, a verifiable benchmark for short-horizon epigenomics analysis. EpiBench evaluates whether agents can make well-defined analysis decisions from realistic workflow states and retu. Automation angle: Switch your portfolio demos to whichever model ranks best on coding/agent benchmarks this week.

new_ai_tools.title: Google Cloud's Open Knowledge Format turns scattered docs into Markdown files for AI agents
new_ai_tools.summary: Google Cloud's Open Knowledge Format (OKF) standardizes scattered org knowledge as Markdown files with YAML frontmatter so AI agents can consume it portably. The minimalist spec is aimed squarely at agent + RAG pipelines. Automation angle: Try it this week and post a build — net-new tooling is the fastest content + portfolio fuel.
